event: Science Fiction Landscape with Hovering Vehicles
description: A digital illustration depicting a quiet winter twilight scene in a Scandinavian-style suburban landscape. Snow covers the ground, fences, and rooftops of modest houses scattered in the background. Two figures — an adult and a child — stand by a wooden fence along a path, the child reaching up and waving at two large, dark hovering vehicles that fly overhead, leaving faint vapor trails against a pastel pink-and-blue evening sky. A wind turbine and a street lamp are visible among the houses.
